topic_context.topic_summary: This topic contains rules that prioritize devices on a network and control smart home actions based on location, time, and device connectivity, enhancing user convenience and optimizing device performance.

rows.if_then_rule: IF Smart Home/Away from ecobee THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn on lights by motion when motion is detected by ecobee.
IF every day of the week at a configured threshold THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn on the lights at 6:00 AM.
IF motion has been detected from Withings Home THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn on Entry Lights.
IF device disconnects from Google Wifi THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat.
IF device connects from Google Wifi THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat.
IF alarm activated from abode THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn all lights on.
IF you exit an area THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn off HVAC.
IF Smart Home/Away from ecobee THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn on lights by motion when motion is detected by ecobee.
IF Smart Home/Away from ecobee THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn on the lights with remote motion sensors.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn on Patio Lights.
IF you enter an area THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn on lights when you get home.
IF say a simple phrase from Google Assistant THEN prioritize device using Google Wifi for a device connected to Onhub/Wifi.
IF say a simple phrase from Google Assistant THEN prioritize your Pixel on your network for an hour.
IF say a simple phrase from Google Assistant THEN prioritize your Chromecast for that hour-long Netflix session.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn on.
IF you exit an area THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn off lights.
IF you enter an area THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn on lights when your iPhone senses you're home.
IF you enter an area THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn on lights when your Android phone senses you are home.
IF device connects from Google Wifi THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat.
IF device disconnects from Google Wifi THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat.
IF device connects from Google Wifi THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat to improve Auto-Away.
IF say a simple phrase from Google Assistant THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to trigger a specific shortcut in Wink.
IF say a simple phrase from Google Assistant THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn on lights.
IF motion detected from Manything THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn on outside lights.
IF sunset from Weather Underground THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn on lights.
IF sunset from Weather Underground THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn on outdoor lights.
IF sunset from Weather Underground THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts 15 minutes before sunset to activate lights.
IF sunset from Weather Underground THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn on lights.
IF sunset from Weather Underground THEN turn outlet on using Wink: Pivot Power Genius.
IF sunrise from Weather Underground THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn outside lights off.
IF sunrise from Weather Underground THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to run a shortcut.
IF new sound or motion event from Nest Cam THEN prioritize device using Google Wifi for Nest Cam on OnHub.
IF button press from Button widget THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn off all lights and adjust thermostat.
IF device disconnects from Google Wifi THEN set temperature range using Nest Thermostat.
IF button press from Button widget THEN toggle outlet on/off using Wink: Pivot Power Genius.
IF device connects from Google Wifi THEN set temperature using GE Appliances GeoSpring.
IF device disconnects from Google Wifi THEN turn off using D-Link Smart Plug.
IF motion detected at location from Homeboy THEN prioritize device using Google Wifi for camera on OnHub.
IF device connects from Google Wifi THEN change camera mode using Withings Home.
IF you exit an area THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn off lights.
IF Smart Home/Away from ecobee THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts for Ecobee Smart Away mode.
IF every day of the week at a configured threshold THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn on all lights.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to activate a Wink shortcut.
IF motion detected from D-Link Motion Sensor THEN prioritize device using Google Wifi for a device connected to OnHub.
IF ignition turned off from Automatic Classic THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn on lights when you get home.
IF device disconnects from Google Wifi THEN set to away mode using Netatmo Thermostat.
IF device connects from Google Wifi THEN turn on lights using Philips Hue.
IF device disconnects from Google Wifi THEN turn off lights using Philips Hue.
IF device connects from Google Wifi THEN switch on using SmartThings.
IF device disconnects from Google Wifi THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts.
IF ignition turned off in area from Automatic Classic THEN prioritize device using Google Wifi.
IF button press from Wink Relay THEN display message on Tesla dashboard using EVE For Tesla.
IF device disconnects from Google Wifi THEN prioritize device using Google Wifi for Nest Cam.
IF device connects from Google Wifi THEN prioritize device using Google Wifi.
IF device disconnects from Google Wifi THEN end activity using Harmony.
IF motion detected from Arlo THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn on lights.
IF you exit an area THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn off lights when iPhone senses you leave home.
IF arriving soon from BMW Labs THEN prioritize device using Google Wifi.
IF device connects from Google Wifi THEN activate a scene using Bang & Olufsen's BeoLink Gateway.
IF device is unplugged from Android Battery THEN prioritize device using Google Wifi.
IF current condition changes from Weather Underground THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn on lights when raining between 4pm and sunset.
IF sunset from Weather Underground THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts to turn on lights.
IF every day at a configured threshold THEN prioritize device using Google Wifi.
IF event from search starts from Google Calendar THEN activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts for home lighting control schedules.

IF new sound or motion event from Nest Cam THEN prioritize device using Google Wifi for Nest Cam on OnHub.
